Features:   - Enhanced trading fee tracking with user metrics   - Liquidation bonus routing through UBI system   - Funding rate fee tracking by market   - Monthly UBI target tracking ($10K target)   - Social impact analytics for derivatives market   - Backward compatibility with existing IFeeSplitterPerp interface Environment Variables:   PRIVATE_KEY    - Deployer private key   GD_TOKEN       - GoodDollar token address (defaults to devnet)   TREASURY       - Protocol treasury address (defaults to deployer)   ADMIN          - Admin address (defaults to deployer) Usage:   forge script script/DeployPerpUBIFeeSplitter.s.sol --rpc-url <RPC>
